top_signals.title: Generation Mining nears C$1 billion copper project funding
top_signals.summary: “With permitting and most of the financing complete, Generation is in good position to move the project forward,” analyst says.

top_signals.title: Nigeria Draws First Tranche of $5 Billion Swap With UAE Bank
top_signals.summary: Nigeria has accessed the first tranche of a $5 billion derivatives deal with United Arab Emirates’ largest lender, pressing ahead with a transaction that has been scrutinized for being opaque.

top_signals.title: Revolut scraps ‘remote-first’ working for graduate hires
top_signals.summary: Europe’s most valuable fintech will require junior staff to spend at least three days a week in the office from next year

top_signals.title: China's nuclear power capacity nearly doubled since 2016
top_signals.summary: From 2016 to 2024, China's nuclear generation capacity increased 76% (24 GW), based on our International Energy Statistics (IES) data. According to the International Atomic Energy Agency's Power Reactor Information System (PRIS), China added an additional 1.1 GW of nuclear power capacity in 2025 and 2.2 GW in 2026 (through May). China is continuing to build out its nuclear generating capacity and has 36 reactors under construction, accounting for more than 49% of total world nuclear construction, according to PRIS.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldsky closes Agnico deal to become sole owner of Swedish project
top_signals.summary: The gold explorer announced in January its intention to buy a 55% interest in the Barsele property from Agnico.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Estrogen patches are hard to find, and it may not be resolved any time soon
top_signals.summary: Estrogen patches are in short supply as demand for menopause treatments skyrockets, and it could take at least a year for manufacturers to catch up.
